title: The Sunny Team Faces Trouble
description: Pages 16–17 focus on the sunny team faces trouble, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: They've got nothing to do with this!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Why won't this night- mare end!? We're gonna die!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Watch as your Allied crew is murdered in cold blood!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: of all times, when my friends are in distress...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Don't you dare get any closer!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Hohhh... looks like someone strong has showed up.

summary: The Sunny Team Faces Trouble focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as sanji and Violet share information, Zoro and Kin'emon try to reach Luffy, and the Donquixote Family reacts to Violet's betrayal.
